nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 白冠帶鵐
nodes.summary: 白冠帶鵐（學名：Zonotrichia leucophrys），以昆蟲為食。 成年的白冠帶鵐身長約18公分，頭部有黑色和白色的條紋，尾巴很長。翅膀是褐色，鳥喙是粉紅色或黃色。白冠帶鵐外觀類似白喉麻雀，但沒有白喉嚨的標記。 附圖 注釋
nodes.shortSummary: 白冠帶鵐（學名：Zonotrichia leucophrys），以昆蟲為食。 成年的白冠帶鵐身長約18公分，頭部有黑色和白色的條紋，尾巴很長。翅膀是褐色，鳥喙是粉紅色或黃色。白冠帶鵐外觀類似白喉麻雀，但沒有白喉嚨的標記。

nodes.name: Zonotrichia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: leucophrys }} The white-crowned sparrow (Zonotrichia leucophrys) is a species of passerine bird native to North America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in brushy areas in the taiga and tundra of the northernmost parts of the continent and in the Rocky Mountains and Pacific coast

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: G.|year=1980|title=White-crowned Sparrows: new to Britain and Ireland|journal=British Birds|volume=73|issue=10|pages=466–470|url=http://www.britishbirds.co.uk/search?id=5518}} It has been sighted in England, Scotland, Ireland, and Norway. In 2008 a white-crowned sparrow was spotted in Cley next the Sea in Norfolk, England. To commemorate the event an image of the bird was included in a window at St Margaret's Church
